syntax_14499.creator: kkaemok
syntax_14499.title: Nametag of Player
syntax_14499.description: Sets/resets a player's nametag to the given string.
syntax_14499.syntax_pattern:
set nametag of %player% to %string%
set nametag of %string% to %string%
reset nametag of %player%
reset nametag of %string%

en: Sets/resets a player's nametag to the given string.

syntax_14522.creator: kkaemok
syntax_14522.title: Skin of player
syntax_14522.description: Sets/resets a player's skin to the given string.
syntax_14522.syntax_pattern:
set skin of %player% to %player%
set skin of %string% to %player%
set skin of %player% to %string%
set skin of %string% to %string%
set skin of %player% to url %string%
set skin of %string% to url %string%
reset skin of %player% 
reset skin of %string%

en: Sets/resets a player's skin to the given string.
